use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons for forms and pages
Destructive action buttons like delete or remove operations
ai_summary: A versatile atomic button component with multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and size options. Built with Radix UI Slot for composition, class-variance-authority for variant management, and Tailwind CSS for styling. Provides standard focus-visible rings, hover states, and disabled states with smooth transitions.
